titleStmt.title: SII 26.556: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 556. (A.R. No. 526 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa right of entrance.

p.hi: Parākrama Pāṇḍyadēva: Ś 1384 and year 31+10 Karkaṭaka (Āḍi) 5, śu. 7, Saturday, Hastam = 1462 A.D., July 3.

summary.p: This inscription is in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It records a grant of land, 2(1/2) mā in extent in Kuṉṟakkuḍi in Teṉṉārināḍu, as iṟaiyili, to a certain Śeṭṭi Āṇḍapiḷḷai Parākramapāṇḍya-mudali alias Parākrama-pāṇḍyadēvaṉ, a servant of the temple of the god Viśvanātha. Also refers to the provision of offerings to the goddess Gaurī by Veṉṟumālaiyiṭṭa-Perumāḷ Vīrapāṇḍyadēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu seṇḍāryyametat sattam samasta suramaulibhiḥ śāsanam viśa nādhasya śambho rjayati śāśvatam .
śakābdam 1000 3 100 8 10 4ṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa naṅkumāraṉ Arikecaridevarāṉa parākkiṟama pāṇṭiyatevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 31iṉ Etir pattāvatu karkaṭaka ñāyaṟṟu Añcāntiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyumanta
vāramum peṟṟa Attattunāḷ nam carakkaṟaiyilum pyabanavaṟaiyilum Uraittu niṟuttuppotumpaṭi kaṟpitta
ceṭṭi Āṇṭapiḷḷai parākramapāṇḍya mutaliyāṉa parākramapāṇḍyatevaṉukku muṉṉāḷ taṉakku
Uṭaimai niṅkalākap peṟumpaṭi kaṟpittup peṟṟup potukiṟa nāḷoṉṟukku nāṉāḻi Ariciccoṟu
teṉṉārināṭṭu kuṉṟakkuṭiyil Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭuk kaiyāṇṭu potukiṟa nilam Orumāvaraiyum niṅ
kalāka taṉakku nāḷ muppatu muṭpirattu māṉa Itukoṇṭu Etirpattāvatu Āṭimātam Añcāntiyati muta
lukku Uṭaimai niṅkalāka nāḷoṉṟukku Irunāḻi Ariciccoṟum nam gauri Ālaiyattil bhogāṅgā
tu naiyil naṅkumāraṉ veṉṟu mālaiyiṭṭaperumāḷ virapāṇṭiyatevar kaṟpittu naṭantu potu
kiṟa paṇiyārattil nāḷoṉṟukku Iraṇṭu toṇṭaṉum peṟumpaṭiyum kuṉṟak kuṭippaṟṟil Iṟaiyili vi
ṭṭanilam Iraṇṭu māvarai Innilam Iraṇṭu māvaraiyum kaittaṭippaṭiye Etir pattāvatu kārmuta
lukku Iṟaiyiliyāka kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyāti yile Ivvo
lai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Iṟaiyili nilamiraṇṭu māvaraiyum kārāṉa payirccey
tukoṇṭu Irunāḻi Ariciccoṟum Iraṇṭu toṇṭaṉum kaṟppitta nāḷ mutalukku nāḷ toṟum pova
candrādityavaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇṭukkoṇṭu turamum muṭṭāmal naṭatti
ppokavum pāṟka Ivai veḷiyāṟṟūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ādicaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.556 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
